news.summary: President Donald Trump expressed frustration Tuesday with allies who have been unwilling to do more to support the US war effort, telling them to “go get your own oil” as the conflict with Iran and its closure of the Strait of Hormuz sent average US gas prices past $4 a gallon. news.headline: Lebanon says Israeli strikes on Beirut area kill 7
news.summary: Lebanon's health ministry said Wednesday that Israeli strikes on Beirut's southern suburbs and a nearby town killed at least seven people, as Israel's military said it had targeted senior Hezbollah members. FRANCE 24's Olivia Bizot reports from Beirut, Lebanon.

news.headline: US Supreme Court rules against ban on 'conversion therapy' for LGBTQ minors
news.summary: The US Supreme Court ruled Tuesday against a Colorado state law banning "conversion therapy" for LGBTQ minors, siding with a Christian therapist who challenged it on the grounds of free speech. news.headline: Which teams are in the FIFA World Cup 2026?
news.summary: A breakdown of the teams and groups of the FIFA World Cup in Canada, Mexico and the US after the final playoffs.

news.headline: Trump's new library draws ridicule as ‘ego tower’ rather than museum
news.summary: PRESS REVIEW – Wednesday 1 April 2026: First, as energy prices continue to rise, Donald Trump slips in the polls. news.headline: 'Massive disappointment': Italy at new low after missing out on yet another World Cup
news.summary: Italians will once again be forced to watch a World Cup from the sidelines after another play-off disaster highlighted just how far one of the great footballing nations has fallen. news.headline: Houthis claim joint missile attack on Israel with Iran and Hezbollah
news.summary: Yemen’s Houthis say they launched a missile attack on Israel in coordination with Iran and Hezbollah.
